proven.claim: Proven: "--verbose"/"-v" is documented in help (line 553) and consumed by
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 553
; Proven: "--verbose"/"-v" is documented in help (line 553) and consumed by
; args.includes("--verbose") || args.includes("-v") in runAnalyze, runDerive, runVerify.
(declare-const verbose_documented Int)
(declare-const verbose_consumed_count Int)
(assert (= verbose_documented 1))
; Appears in 3 subcommand functions
(assert (= verbose_consumed_count 3))
(assert (not (and (= verbose_documented 1) (> verbose_consumed_count 0))))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — --verbose is documented and consumed in 3 functions
